title: vitis shuttleworthii
intro: Vitis shuttleworthii is a species of grape vine native to eastern Asia, specifically in China, Japan, and Korea. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Vitis shuttleworthii include reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and protecting against certain types of cancer. The herbal preparations of Vitis shuttleworthii include teas, tinctures, and extracts, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
